message:
A little love letter to the senior cats. 🐈‍⬛💛

If your cat is moving a little slower these days, sleeping more, and choosing the sunny spot over the high shelf — they're not "done" playing. Older cats still crave stimulation; they just need it gently adjusted to fit their golden years.

A few small things that make a big difference:
🪜 A ramp or step stool so favorite perches stay reachable without a painful jump
🧶 Short, soft play sessions — a few minutes of wand-toy "hunting" keeps both body and mind sharp
🐦 A cozy window perch for hours of bird-watching (the original cat TV)
🧠 Easy puzzle feeders or a pinch of catnip to spark a happy little burst of energy
🛏️ Warm, supportive bedding for achy joints

Pair all of it with regular checkups, and you've got a recipe for a happy, dignified old age.

Tell me about your senior sweetheart — how old is your oldest cat? 🐾
